title: glycosmis longifolia
intro: Glycosmis longifolia, also known as the Indonesian bitter bean or bitter neem, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glycosmis longifolia include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, oils, and infusions that can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health applications.
